Legal

Troupe Terms of Service

Last Updated: April 6, 2026

1. Agreement

These Terms govern your use of the Troupe app and services. By creating an account or using Troupe, you agree to these Terms.

2. Eligibility

  • You must be at least 13 years old.
  • You must provide accurate account information.
  • You are responsible for your account credentials and account activity.

3. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Harass, threaten, impersonate, scam, or abuse other users.
  • Upload unlawful, infringing, or harmful content.
  • Attempt unauthorized access, reverse engineering, scraping, or automation abuse.
  • Circumvent moderation, safety, or rate-limit controls.

4. User Content and License

  • You retain ownership of your content.
  • You grant us a limited license to host, process, display, and transmit content to operate and improve the service, enforce policies, and comply with law.

5. Matching, Messaging, and Safety

  • Matching and messaging features are provided as-is.
  • You are responsible for your communications and interactions.
  • We may moderate, remove content, or restrict accounts when needed for safety, compliance, or abuse prevention.

6. Location Features

  • Location sharing is optional and controlled by app/device permissions.
  • If enabled, approximate location (for example city/country) may be shown per your settings.
  • Background or foreground location behavior may vary by app version and OS permission state.

7. Termination

We may suspend or terminate accounts for violations, abuse, security risk, or legal requirements. You may request account deletion from within the app or via our account deletion web page.

8. Disclaimers

The service is provided "as is" and "as available". We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, absolute security, or compatibility with all devices.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent allowed by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of the service.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of Ontario, Canada, unless mandatory local consumer law applies otherwise.

11. Contact

  • Email: infotroupe1@gmail.com
  • Address: 58 Haynes Avenue, North York, Ontario M3J 0C1, Canada

Public legal page for Google Play compliance.
